query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.status, 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM questionnaireAnswersV3 WHERE projectId = p.id) as answers,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM questionnaireProgressV3 WHERE projectId = p.id) as progress_rows
FROM projects p
WHERE p.status = 'questionario'
ORDER BY p.id DESC LIMIT 5;
